大小单双老师带.【网：59FC·CC】【网：95FC·CC】【QQ：5075273】【网：35FC·CC】<浏览器手动输入网址>【首单返利50%】【来富彩，马上发】【富彩祝您】【鸿运当头好运来】【财源滚滚为您开】【精彩纷呈乐不停】【大奖小奖进家门】JINYUAN666《金源导师》<br>原文翻译及赏析_作者李白<br>青天有月来几时？我今停杯一问之。<br>人攀明月不可得，月行却与人相随。<br>皎如飞镜临丹阙，绿烟灭尽清辉发。<br>但见宵从海上来，宁知晓向云间没。<br>白兔捣药秋复春，嫦娥孤栖与谁邻？<br>今人不见古时月，今月曾经照古人。<br>古人今人若流水，共看明月皆如此。<br>唯愿当歌对酒时，月光长照金樽里。<br>[![66.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/SsTM0tXD/66.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/hzmjTs1d)<br>[![67.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/C1kx7PGg/67.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/CBM0L4rP)<br>[![68.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/NM6QmycS/68.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/r0p6LwzN)<br>[![82.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/4NNXHNSg/82.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/z3Ms95Nt)<br>[![83.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/DwRhNQy8/83.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/K17CkMT2)<br>[![84.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/1XWhrwj1/84.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/dZTxqkF5)<br>------------------<br>vk.com/topic-239284320_65856758<br>vk.com/topic-239183296_65120143<br>vk.com/topic-239183403_64967680<br>vk.com/topic-239218562_65410502<br>vk.com/topic-239199498_65311477<br>vk.com/topic-239251780_65856781<br>vk.com/topic-239218348_65311482<br>vk.com/topic-239251557_66238843<br>vk.com/topic-239241884_64799127<br>vk.com/topic-239191805_64714086<br>vk.com/topic-239286204_64799139<br>vk.com/topic-239183414_64799145<br>vk.com/topic-239251788_65311512<br>vk.com/topic-239183521_66464392<br>vk.com/topic-239149381_66464402<br>vk.com/topic-239183346_65120220<br>vk.com/topic-239280229_65588499<br>vk.com/topic-239149378_65311534<br>vk.com/topic-239272758_65311536<br>vk.com/topic-239251724_64799183<br>vk.com/topic-239251717_66238895<br>vk.com/topic-239183419_65588509<br>vk.com/topic-239297444_64799195<br>vk.com/topic-239251573_64967760<br>vk.com/topic-239251590_65856839<br>vk.com/topic-239218367_66238908<br>vk.com/topic-239182964_64799207<br>vk.com/topic-239218544_64799208<br>vk.com/topic-239284320_65856859<br>vk.com/topic-239183296_65120272<br>vk.com/topic-239183403_64967774<br>vk.com/topic-239218562_65410557<br>vk.com/topic-239199498_65311584<br>vk.com/topi
